---
title: "Chengxu Liu"
image: "files/profile_pic.jpg"
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      href: mailto:chl336@ucsd.com
    - icon: linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/heimianbaobao
---

Welcome to my website!

I am a student at UCSD majored in MSBA and interested in data science, technology, and building projects.
This website is created using Quarto as part of my coursework.
